summary: Affiliate System Full Controlled Program testing complete. All 20 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Public apply page with Apply Now/Check Status tabs, Admin affiliate applications page with stats banner and approve/reject, Affiliate dashboard with earnings KPIs and content studio, Admin Settings Hub with contract tiers (Starter/Growth/Top) and status engine.

issues: Route is at /admin/affiliate-applications not /admin/partnerships/affiliate-applications as mentioned in review request - this is a documentation/navigation issue, not a bug

critical_code_review_comments: The affiliate applications admin page is at /admin/affiliate-applications, not /admin/partnerships/affiliate-applications - sidebar navigation shows it under GROWTH & AFFILIATES > Applications
seed_data_creation: Created test applications during backend testing (prefixed with test_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Affiliate System is fully functional. Key routes: Public apply at /partners/apply, Admin applications at /admin/affiliate-applications, Affiliate dashboard at /partner/affiliate-dashboard, Settings Hub at /admin/settings-hub (Affiliate Policy tab). Test affiliate wizard.test@example.com has setup_complete=true and promo code WIZARD2024. Contract tiers: Starter (5 deals/50K TZS), Growth (20 deals/250K TZS), Top (60 deals/1M TZS). Status engine thresholds: Warning 50%, Probation 25%.

details: Apply Now and Check Status tabs present
Dashboard shows earnings KPIs (NOT revenue/profit/vendor cost)
Target progress with contract tier targets vs actuals
Content studio with campaigns and auto-injected promo codes
GET /api/affiliate-program/campaigns - returns products with promo code injection
Each campaign has: name, selling_price, promo_code, product_link, caption, your_earning
GET /api/affiliate-program/my-performance - contract tier targets vs actuals
Affiliate Policy tab in Settings Hub
